title: Query Execution Plans (EXPLAIN ANALYZE)
description: Analyze query execution plans using tools like `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` to understand database query behavior. Diagnose performance bottlenecks by distinguishing between index scans and sequential scans and identifying optimizer miscalculations in join cardinality.
objectives: Analyze query execution plans using tools like `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` to understand database query behavior.
Diagnose performance bottlenecks by distinguishing between index scans and sequential scans and identifying optimizer miscalculations in join cardinality.
